parents.subject: LU-18506 osp: ensure args are freed

commit.subject: LU-19422 quota: pool recalc must work even with one quota type
commit.message:
LU-19422 quota: pool recalc must work even with one quota type

Don't stop Pool Quotas recalculation if one or two quota types are
disabled. It should work even when only one quota type is enabled.

Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I7201cc53d286bbfb0ddb44a56f92c35c42bcf2d4
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61541
Reviewed-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
